scripts.clean: npx shx rm -rf packages/vscode/out web/dist packages/desktop/out packages/desktop/dist packages/desktop/web packages/desktop-tauri/out packages/desktop-tauri/web
scripts.vscode:prepublish: node scripts/build-config.mjs && npm run build:web && node scripts/generate-version.mjs && npm run bundle:vscode
scripts.desktop:build: node scripts/generate-version.mjs && node scripts/build-config.mjs && npm run build:web:desktop && npm run bundle:desktop
scripts.desktop:start: npm run desktop:build && npm run desktop:rebuild-native && npm run start -w ccrelay-desktop
scripts.desktop:pack:mac: npm run desktop:build && npm run pack:mac -w ccrelay-desktop
scripts.desktop:pack:win: npm run desktop:build && npm run pack:win -w ccrelay-desktop
scripts.build:web:tauri: npx shx rm -rf packages/desktop-tauri/web && cd web && npm run build && npx shx mkdir -p ../packages/desktop-tauri && npx shx cp -r dist ../packages/desktop-tauri/web
scripts.tauri:build: node scripts/generate-version.mjs && node scripts/build-config.mjs && npm run build:web:tauri && npm run bundle:tauri
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run tauri:build && cd packages/desktop-tauri && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:pack:mac: npm run tauri:build && cd packages/desktop-tauri && npx tauri build
scripts.tauri:pack:win: npm run tauri:build && cd packages/desktop-tauri && npx tauri build
scripts.build:web: npx shx rm -rf packages/vscode/out/web && cd web && npm install && npm run build && npx shx mkdir -p ../packages/vscode/out/web && npx shx cp -r dist/* ../packages/vscode/out/web/
scripts.build:web:desktop: npx shx rm -rf packages/desktop/web && cd web && npm run build && npx shx mkdir -p ../packages/desktop && npx shx cp -r dist ../packages/desktop/web
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:web && npm run bundle:vscode
scripts.build:dev: node scripts/build-config.mjs dev && npm run build
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/build-config.mjs prod && npm run build
scripts.compile: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/vscode/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/desktop/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/desktop-tauri/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: npm run type-check && eslint packages/core/src packages/vscode/src packages/desktop/src tests --max-warnings=0
scripts.package:vscode: npm run vscode:prepublish && node scripts/sync-vscode-pack-deps.mjs && npx shx cp README.md README_CN.md CHANGELOG.md LICENSE packages/vscode/ && npx shx mkdir -p dists && cd packages/vscode && npx vsce package --no-dependencies --out ../../dists && npx shx rm -f README.md README_CN.md CHANGELOG.md LICENSE
